ignore_patterns.description: Glob patterns for files and directories to exclude from analysis

include_tests.description: Whether to include _test.go files in analysis

rules.description: Per-rule severity overrides. Keys are rule names, values are severity levels.

cyclomatic_threshold.description: Cyclomatic complexity threshold above which the high-cyclomatic-complexity rule triggers

cognitive_threshold.description: Cognitive complexity threshold above which the high-cognitive-complexity rule triggers

min_duplicate_lines.description: Minimum number of duplicate lines required to trigger the code-duplication rule

min_duplicate_tokens.description: Minimum number of duplicate tokens required to trigger the code-duplication rule

architecture_layers.description: Ordered list of architecture layers used to enforce import boundaries

packages.description: Import path patterns that belong to this layer

can_import.description: Names of other layers this layer is allowed to import from

ignore_exports.description: Exported symbol names to exclude from the unused-export rules

god_package_threshold.description: Number of exported symbols above which the god-package rule triggers
